description: Active immutable anomaly run and source signature per well, stage, and algorithm version.
sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fleet_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS pad_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS active_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_signature, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS source_rows, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS first_source_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS last_source_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS latest_source_updated_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processed_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS status FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
